goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'lynne strover gallery'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should serve 'christmas' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called lynne strover gallery
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should be in the centre
The restaurant should serve christmas food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Make sure you get phone number
